name: GmailConnector
description: Ingests, manages, and deletes Gmail messages and threads via the Gmail REST API v1 with OAuth 2.0 authorization.

install_fields.label: Allow Permanent Delete
install_fields.help: When enabled, the connector can permanently delete messages and threads (unrecoverable). Requires the https://mail.google.com/ OAuth scope. Defaults to false (trash/soft-delete only).

methods.name: install
methods.description: Validates connector config and returns a PENDING ConnectorStatus — no API call.

methods.name: authorize
methods.description: Exchanges an OAuth 2.0 authorization code for access and refresh tokens.

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Verifies token validity by calling the Gmail users/me/profile endpoint.

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Ingests new or updated messages via the Gmail list/get API with pageToken pagination; propagates deletions by diffing known IDs against the current response.

methods.name: list_email
methods.description: Lists Gmail messages matching a query string; returns raw page dict including nextPageToken.

methods.name: read_email
methods.description: Fetches a single Gmail message by ID and returns a NormalizedDocument.

methods.name: add_email
methods.description: Applies label IDs to a Gmail message via messages.modify.

methods.name: delete_email
methods.description: Alias for delete_message — trashes or permanently deletes a message.

methods.name: remove_email
methods.description: Alias for soft-delete — moves a message to Trash.

methods.name: delete_message
methods.description: Trashes (permanent=False) or permanently deletes (permanent=True) a single Gmail message. Permanent delete requires allow_permanent_delete=True in config.

methods.name: delete_thread
methods.description: Trashes (permanent=False) or permanently deletes (permanent=True) an entire Gmail thread. Permanent delete requires allow_permanent_delete=True in config.

methods.name: bulk_delete
methods.description: Deletes all messages matching a Gmail query; collects all IDs via pageToken pagination first, then deletes individually with per-message error catching.

methods.name: disconnect
methods.description: Clears stored OAuth tokens and resets the connector auth status to PENDING.
